output.code:
# Read the file content
path = "/mnt/data/file-GQgmpwEgsvWjkaPuV6ydPS-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:200], text[-200:]

# Find the index of the colon after the phrase "قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم:"
prefix = "قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم:"
start_pos = text.find(prefix)
start_pos, text[start_pos:start_pos+len(prefix)]

# Determine the matn start index, skipping a space if present
colon_end = start_pos + len(prefix)
following = text[colon_end:colon_end+5]
colon_end, repr(following)

# Find first non-whitespace after colon_end
i = colon_end
while i < len(text) and text[i].isspace():
    i += 1
matn_start = i
text[matn_start:matn_start+20], matn_start

# Check trailing characters
tail = text[-20:]
repr(tail), [ord(c) for c in tail]

matn_end = len(text)
span_text = text[matn_start:matn_end]
matn_start, matn_end, span_text[:50], span_text[-50:], len(span_text)
